name.ja: <ruby>絶<rt>ぜつ</rt></ruby><ruby>望<rt>ぼう</rt></ruby>との<ruby>遭<rt>そう</rt></ruby><ruby>遇<rt>ぐう</rt></ruby>

requirement.en: When your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster.

effect.en: Special Summon 1 DARK Attribute Fiend Type monster with 1200 or 2400 DEF from your hand or Graveyard to your opponent's field in face-up Defense Position. Then, you can destroy 1 face-up Level 8 or lower monster on your opponent's field.
